Title: User Registration
Description: As a visitor, I want to register with my email, name, password, and role, so that I can access the platform.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User can select role: Stagiaire or Formateur
- Stagiaire can select speciality + year
- Email must be unique — display error if taken
- Password requires minimum 6 characters
- Password confirmation field must match
- On success, user is redirected to Dashboard
- JWT token is stored in localStorage
Subtasks:
- Create RegisterPage UI with form fields (2h)
- Implement form validation (client-side) (1h)
- Connect to POST /api/auth/register (1h)
- Create registerUser async thunk in authSlice (1h)
- Handle error states and display messages (1h)

Title: User Login
Description: As a registered user, I want to log in with my email and password, so that I can access my account.
Acceptance Criteria:
- User enters email + password
- On success, JWT is stored and user is redirected to Dashboard
- On failure, a clear error message is displayed
- Loading spinner is shown during request
Subtasks:
- Create LoginPage UI (1.5h)
- Create loginUser async thunk (1h)
- Store JWT + user in localStorage and Redux (1h)
- Handle API errors and display feedback (1h)
- Add redirect to Dashboard on success (0.5h)

Title: JWT Token Management
Description: As a logged-in user, I want my session to persist across page refreshes, so that I don't have to log in every time.
Acceptance Criteria:
- JWT token is auto-attached to every API request via Axios interceptor
- On 401 response, user is redirected to login and token cleared
- On app load, user state is restored from localStorage
Subtasks:
- Configure Axios interceptor for Authorization header (1h)
- Implement 401 response interceptor with redirect (1h)
- Restore auth state from localStorage on app init (1h)

Title: Protected Routes
Description: As a platform admin, I want unauthenticated users blocked from protected pages, so that only logged-in users can access the platform.
Acceptance Criteria:
- ProtectedRoute redirects unauthenticated users to /login
- RoleGuard blocks users without the required role → /unauthorized
- Admin routes only accessible by admin role
- Formateur routes accessible by formateur + admin
- Unauthorized page displays clear message with back link
Subtasks:
- Create ProtectedRoute component (1h)
- Create RoleGuard component (1h)
- Create UnauthorizedPage (0.5h)
- Configure route nesting in router.tsx (1.5h)
- Test all role-based access scenarios (1h)

Title: Logout
Description: As a logged-in user, I want to log out of my account, so that I can secure my session.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Logout button in Navbar
- On click, JWT and user data cleared from localStorage + Redux
- User redirected to login page
Subtasks:
- Add logout action to authSlice (0.5h)
- Add logout button to Navbar (0.5h)
- Clear storage and redirect on logout (0.5h)

Title: Auto-Redirect Authenticated Users
Description: As a logged-in user, I want to be redirected to Dashboard if I visit /login, so that I don't see the login page unnecessarily.
Acceptance Criteria: - If user is authenticated and visits /login or /register, redirect to /dashboard
Subtasks: - Add redirect logic in LoginPage and RegisterPage (1h)

Title: Password Reset
Description: As a user who forgot my password, I want to reset it via email, so that I can regain access.

Title: View Courses List
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to see a list of all available courses, so that I can find courses relevant to me.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Courses displayed in responsive grid (1/2/3 columns)
- Each card shows: thumbnail, title, description, formateur, rating, speciality
- Loading spinner while fetching
- Empty state when no courses found
- Pagination if > 12 courses
Subtasks:
- Create CourseCard component (1.5h)
- Create CoursesPage with grid layout (2h)
- Create coursesSlice with fetchCourses thunk (1.5h)
- Create coursesService.getAll() (0.5h)
- Add pagination component (1h)

Title: Course Details Page
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to see full details of a course, so that I can understand its content before studying.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Hero banner with thumbnail/gradient fallback
- Displays: title, description, content, speciality, year, formateur, date, rating
- Lists attached resources with download buttons
- Shows edit/delete buttons for owner (formateur) and admin only
- Back button to courses list
Subtasks:
- Create CourseDetailsPage UI (2h)
- Create fetchCourseById thunk (1h)
- Display resources section (1h)
- Conditional edit/delete buttons per role (1h)

Title: Create Course
Description: As a formateur, I want to create a new course with title, description, content, speciality, and year, so that my students can access my teaching material.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Only formateurs and admins can access the create form
- Form fields: title, description, content (textarea), speciality (dropdown), year, thumbnail (optional)
- Validation: title and description required
- On success, redirect to new course details
- Success toast notification
Subtasks:
- Create CreateCoursePage with form (2h)
- Implement coursesService.create() with FormData (1h)
- Add route guard for formateur role (0.5h)
- Add success redirect and toast (0.5h)

Title: Edit Course
Description: As a formateur, I want to edit my existing course, so that I can keep it up to date.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Pre-populated form with current values
- Only course owner or admin can access
- On save, updated course is displayed
Subtasks:
- Create EditCoursePage (reuse form component) (1.5h)
- Implement coursesService.update() (0.5h)
- Ownership check before rendering form (0.5h)

Title: Delete Course
Description: As a formateur, I want to delete a course I created, so that I can remove outdated content.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Confirmation modal before deletion
- Only owner or admin can delete
- On success, redirect to courses list
- Course removed from Redux store
Subtasks:
- Create confirmation modal component (1h)
- Implement coursesService.delete() (0.5h)
- Handle Redux state cleanup (0.5h)

Title: Filter Courses by Speciality & Year
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to filter courses by speciality and year, so that I see only relevant courses.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Dropdown filters for speciality and year
- Filters trigger re-fetch
- Reset button clears filters
- Toggleable filter panel
Subtasks:
- Add filter dropdowns to CoursesPage (1h)
- Pass filter params to fetchCourses (0.5h)
- Add reset button (0.5h)

Title: Course Thumbnail Upload
Description: As a formateur, I want to upload a thumbnail image for my course, so that it looks attractive in the listing.
Acceptance Criteria:
- File picker accepts images only (JPG, PNG, WebP)
- Preview shown before submission
- Max file size: 5MB
Subtasks:
- Create image upload component with preview (1.5h)
- Integrate into create/edit course form (1h)

Title: View Resources List
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to see a list of available resources, so that I can find materials to study.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Resources displayed in list view with type icon, title, size, date
- Pending validation badge for unvalidated resources
- Loading and empty states
- Download button per resource
Subtasks:
- Create ResourcesPage UI (2h)
- Create resourcesSlice and fetchResources thunk (1h)
- Create resourcesService.getAll() (0.5h)
- Add type icons mapping (PDF, video, document) (0.5h)

Title: Upload Resource
Description: As a formateur, I want to upload a PDF, video, or document, so that students can access it.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Only formateur or admin can upload
- File picker with supported formats (PDF, MP4, DOCX, etc.)
- Title auto-fills from filename
- Upload progress indicator
- Resource added to list after upload
Subtasks:
- Create file upload UI with hidden input (1h)
- Implement resourcesService.upload() with FormData (1h)
- Add upload progress bar (1.5h)
- Refresh list after successful upload (0.5h)

Title: Download Resource
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to download a resource file, so that I can study offline.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Click download triggers blob download
- File saves with original filename
- Loading state on download button
Subtasks:
- Implement resourcesService.download() with responseType blob (1h)
- Trigger browser download via object URL (1h)

Title: Filter Resources by Speciality / Year / Type
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to filter resources by speciality, year, and type, so that I find exactly what I need.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Three dropdown filters: speciality, year, type
- Filters trigger re-fetch with params
- Toggleable filter panel
Subtasks:
- Add filter dropdowns to ResourcesPage (1h)
- Pass filter params to API call (0.5h)
- Toggle visibility of filter panel (0.5h)

Title: Delete Resource
Description: As a formateur, I want to delete a resource I uploaded, so that I can remove outdated files.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Confirmation before deletion
- Only uploader or admin can delete
- Resource removed from list
Subtasks:
- Add delete button (role-gated) (0.5h)
- Confirmation modal + API call (1h)

Title: Link Resource to Course
Description: As a formateur, I want to attach resources to a specific course, so that students can find them in context.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Course selector dropdown during upload
- Resources appear in course details page
Subtasks:
- Add optional course selector to upload form (1h)
- Display linked resources in CourseDetailsPage (1h)

Title: Rate a Course
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to rate a course from 1 to 5 stars, so that I can share my feedback.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Interactive star rating (1-5)
- Optional comment field
- User can only rate once per course
- Submit button disabled until stars selected
- Rating added to list immediately
Subtasks:
- Create interactive StarRating component (1h)
- Create CourseRatings component with form (2h)
- Implement ratingsService.create() (0.5h)
- Check if user already rated (hide form if yes) (0.5h)

Title: Display Average Rating
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to see the average rating on course cards and details, so that I can identify high-quality courses.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Star display + numeric average + total count on CourseCard
- Same display on CourseDetailsPage
- Updates after new rating submitted
Subtasks:
- Add StarRating display to CourseCard (0.5h)
- Add average display to CourseDetailsPage (0.5h)
- Refresh average after new submission (0.5h)

Title: View All Reviews
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to read other students' reviews on a course, so that I can make an informed decision.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List of reviews with user avatar, name, date, stars, comment
- Sorted by most recent
- No reviews message if empty
Subtasks:
- Create review list UI in CourseRatings (1h)
- Implement ratingsService.getByCourse() (0.5h)

Title: Edit/Delete Own Rating
Description: As a stagiaire, I want to edit or delete my rating, so that I can update my feedback.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Edit and delete buttons visible only on own review
- Edit opens inline form with current values
- Delete requires confirmation
Subtasks:
- Add edit/delete buttons (owner only) (0.5h)
- Implement edit inline mode (1h)
- Implement delete with confirmation (0.5h)

Title: View Questions List
Description: As a user, I want to see a list of all questions, so that I can find help or help others.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Questions displayed with title, excerpt, author, date, vote count, answer count, tags
- Sorted by most recent
- Loading and empty states
- Clickable → navigates to question detail
Subtasks:
- Create ForumPage with questions list (2h)
- Create forumSlice with fetchQuestions thunk (1h)
- Create forumService.getAll() (0.5h)
- Tags display with styled badges (0.5h)

Title: Ask a Question
Description: As a user, I want to post a new question with title, body, and tags, so that I can get help from the community.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Toggle Ask Question form
- Fields: title (required), body/details (required), tags (comma-separated)
- On submit, question appears in list
- Form resets and closes after submission
Subtasks:
- Create new question form UI (1.5h)
- Implement forumService.createQuestion() (0.5h)
- Refresh question list after submission (0.5h)
- Form validation (title + body required) (0.5h)

Title: View Question Detail & Answers
Description: As a user, I want to view a question with its full details and all answers, so that I can read the discussion.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Full question body displayed
- List of answers with author, date, body, vote count
- Accepted answer highlighted
- No answers yet empty state
Subtasks:
- Create QuestionDetailPage (2h)
- Create fetchQuestionById thunk (1h)
- Display answer list with accepted badge (1h)

Title: Answer a Question
Description: As a user, I want to submit an answer to a question, so that I can help the community.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Textarea for answer body (required)
- Submit button with loading state
- New answer appears in list immediately
Subtasks:
- Create answer form at bottom of question detail (1h)
- Implement forumService.createAnswer() (0.5h)
- Refresh answers after submission (0.5h)

Title: Vote on Questions and Answers
Description: As a user, I want to upvote or downvote questions and answers, so that the best content rises to the top.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Up/down vote buttons on questions and answers
- Vote count updates immediately (optimistic UI)
- User can change their vote
- Cannot vote on own content
Subtasks:
- Create vote button component (1h)
- Implement forumService.voteQuestion() (0.5h)
- Implement forumService.voteAnswer() (0.5h)
- Optimistic UI update on vote (1h)

Title: Accept Answer
Description: As a question author, I want to mark an answer as accepted, so that others know the problem is solved.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Accept button visible only to question author
- Only one answer can be accepted
- Accepted answer gets green checkmark and moves to top
Subtasks:
- Add accept button (author-gated) (0.5h)
- Implement forumService.acceptAnswer() (0.5h)
- Visual styling for accepted answer (0.5h)

Title: Global Search Bar
Description: As a user, I want a search bar in the Navbar, so that I can quickly find courses from anywhere.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Search input in Navbar (hidden on mobile)
- Pressing Enter navigates to /search?q=query
- Query pre-filled on SearchPage
Subtasks:
- Add search input to Navbar (0.5h)
- Navigate to search page with query param on Enter (0.5h)
- Read query param in SearchPage and trigger search (0.5h)

Title: Search Results Page
Description: As a user, I want to see search results with filters, so that I can refine my search.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Search input with search button
- Filters: speciality, year
- Results displayed as CourseCard grid
- Result count shown
- Empty state for no results
Subtasks:
- Create SearchPage UI with form (2h)
- Create searchService.searchCourses() (0.5h)
- Integrate speciality/year filter dropdowns (1h)
- Display results using CourseCard (0.5h)

Title: Debounced Search Suggestions
Description: As a user, I want to see live suggestions as I type, so that I can find courses faster.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Dropdown suggestions appear after 300ms debounce
- Clicking a suggestion navigates to course

Title: Dashboard Statistics
Description: As an admin, I want to see platform statistics at a glance, so that I can monitor overall health.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Stat cards: total users, courses, resources, questions
- Users by role breakdown
- Recent activity feed
- Pending resources alert
Subtasks:
- Create AdminDashboard page (2h)
- Create adminService.getStats() (0.5h)
- Build stat cards with gradient icons (1h)
- Build recent activity feed (1h)

Title: Manage Users
Description: As an admin, I want to view, edit, and delete user accounts, so that I can manage the user base.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Table of users with name, email, role, registration date
- Search/filter users by role
- Edit user role or details
- Delete user with confirmation
- Pagination for large user lists
Subtasks:
- Create UsersManagementPage with data table (3h)
- Implement adminService.getUsers() (0.5h)
- Edit user modal with form (1.5h)
- Delete user with confirmation modal (1h)
- Role filter and search (1h)

Title: Validate Resources
Description: As an admin, I want to approve or reject uploaded resources, so that only quality content is available.
Acceptance Criteria:
- List of pending resources with file details
- Approve and Reject buttons
- Approved resources become visible to all users
- Rejected resources are deleted with notification
Subtasks:
- Create pending resources list UI (1.5h)
- Implement adminService.validateResource() (0.5h)
- Implement adminService.rejectResource() (0.5h)
- Update pending count on dashboard (0.5h)

Title: View Platform Activity
Description: As an admin, I want to see recent activity logs, so that I can monitor platform usage.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Timeline of events: course created, resource uploaded, user registered, question asked
- Each event shows description, user, timestamp
- Sorted by most recent
Subtasks:
- Create activity feed component (1.5h)
- Fetch and display activity data from API (1h)

Title: View Platform Charts
Description: As an admin, I want to see visual charts of platform growth, so that I can track trends.

Title: View Profile
Description: As a user, I want to see my profile information, so that I can verify my details.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Avatar with initials
- Display: name, email, role, speciality, year
- Clean card layout
Subtasks:
- Create ProfilePage with avatar and info cards (1.5h)
- Display user data from Redux store (0.5h)

Title: Edit Profile
Description: As a user, I want to edit my name and email, so that I can keep my information current.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Toggle edit mode with Edit button
- Editable fields: first name, last name, email
- Save button calls API and updates Redux store
- Loading state during save
Subtasks:
- Add edit/save toggle mode (1h)
- Implement authService.updateProfile() (0.5h)
- Update Redux store after save (0.5h)

Title: Change Password
Description: As a user, I want to change my password, so that I can maintain security.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Fields: current password, new password, confirm new password
- Validation: passwords match, min 6 chars
- Success/error feedback
Subtasks:
- Create change password form section (1h)
- Implement change password API call (0.5h)

Title: Upload Avatar
Description: As a user, I want to upload a profile picture, so that others can identify me.

Title: Main Layout with Navbar & Sidebar
Description: As a user, I want a consistent navigation layout, so that I can easily navigate the platform.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Fixed top Navbar with logo, search, notifications, user menu
- Sidebar with navigation links
- Sidebar links change based on user role
- Mobile responsive: hamburger menu toggles sidebar
- Active link highlighted
Subtasks:
- Create Navbar component (2h)
- Create Sidebar component with role-based links (2h)
- Create MainLayout wrapper (0.5h)
- Mobile responsive sidebar with overlay (1h)

Title: 404 Not Found Page
Description: As a user, I want a friendly 404 page, so that I know when a page doesn't exist.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Displays 404 with message
- Link back to dashboard
Subtasks: - Create NotFoundPage (0.5h)

Title: Reusable UI Component Library
Description: As a developer, I want shared UI components (Button, Input, Card, etc.), so that the UI is consistent across the platform.
Acceptance Criteria:
- Button with variants: primary, secondary, danger, ghost + sizes + loading
- Input with label, error, icon props
- Card with optional hover effect
- LoadingSpinner, EmptyState, StarRating components
Subtasks:
- Create Button, Input, Card components (1.5h)
- Create LoadingSpinner, EmptyState, StarRating (1h)
